name: Chickpeas Sundried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 cups dried chickpeas, soaked and cooked until tender
5 medium onions, minced (or pureed for convenience)
3 oz sun-dried tomatoes, rehydrated and pureed
several dried red chilies, rehydrated and pureed
enough cayenne pepper for desired heat level
recipeInstructions:
1. Reserve 1/4 cup chopped onion.
2. Sauté (or reduce) the reserved onion in a wok or deep frying pan until fragrant.
3. Add sun-dried tomatoes, rehydrated red chilies, and any remaining reserved onion. Cook for about 5 minutes to create a thick paste.
4. Stir in cumin and coriander seed for about a minute.
5. Add chickpea water, turmeric, garam masala, and desired amount of cayenne pepper and salt.
6. Incorporate the cooked chickpeas into the sauce mixture and simmer until reduced to a dry consistency that clings to the chickpeas.
7. Stir in reserved chopped onion, lemon juice, fresh green chilies (minced), grated ginger, and additional salt if desired.
8. Serve over rice or bulgur.
